expectations.text: Materializes review_scope_files from staged + unstaged + untracked files
expectations.evidence: Response materializes `review_scope_files` as `src/staged_api.ts`, `docs/staged_notes.md`, `src/unstaged_service.ts`, and `scripts/new_check.sh`, covering staged, unstaged, and untracked files.

expectations.text: States subagents must not recompute or narrow scope independently
expectations.evidence: Response says `Do not narrow or recompute the controller-defined scope` and rejects the proposed narrowed review as `not accepted`.

expectations.text: Reports missing files when only a subset is reviewed
expectations.evidence: Response reports `Missing Files: 3` and lists the three unreviewed in-scope files.

expectations.text: Applies Completion Gate with INCOMPLETE status when Missing Files > 0
expectations.evidence: Response includes `Completion Gate: Missing Files > 0 => INCOMPLETE (requires explicit deferment/approval)`.

claims.claim: Reviewer subagents must use the controller-defined review scope instead of narrowing it themselves.
claims.evidence: The response explicitly calls the narrowed review a mismatch and instructs reviewers not to recompute scope.
